title: Mothers Day Money Tin Savings Bank Lovely Mum 1758
features: This Money tin is an ideal gift for special occasions like Mother's Day, Birthday, or Christmas.
With a height of 15cm, it can hold up to approx. £100 worth of coins.
Made from durable tinplate, each money tin showcases a vibrant full-color printed design and a convenient single money slot.
Pink design wraps all the way round the Tin, with wording "Treats for a lovely Mum"
Please note that a tin opener is required to access the contents of the tin.
